title: Snap Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results

Q4 2024 Financial Performance

Fourth quarter revenue increased 14% year-over-year to $1,557 million. Daily active users increased 9% year-over-year to 453 million. Net income was $9 million, representing the company's first full quarter of profitability in 2024.

Full Year 2024 Results

Full year 2024 revenue was $5,361 million, compared to $4,606 million in the prior year, an increase of 16% year-over-year. Full year net loss was $698 million, compared to $648 million in the prior year. Full year adjusted EBITDA was $509 million, compared to $334 million in the prior year, a 52% increase.

Cash Flow and Capital Allocation

Full year operating cash flow was $1,046 million, compared to $710 million in the prior year. Free cash flow was $772 million, compared to $532 million in the prior year. The company repurchased $500 million in common stock during the year.

User and Engagement Metrics

Full year daily active users averaged 439 million, compared to 414 million in the prior year. Monthly active users were 956 million as of December 31, 2024. Snapchat+ subscriptions exceeded 12 million paying subscribers.

Q1 2025 Guidance

Management provided Q1 2025 revenue guidance of $1.32-1.40 billion, representing growth of 13-17% year-over-year, with the midpoint above analyst consensus of $1.34 billion.
